name: Royal Icing
recipeIngredient: 5 tablespoons meringue powder (found in cake decorating stores)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all the ingredients in the bowl of an electric mixer.
2. Beat slowly until they are blended.
3. Increase speed to medium and beat until icing forms stiff peaks, about 5 minutes.
4. Adjust consistency by adding more sugar if needed or a few drops of water if too stiff.
5. Use immediately or cover the bowl with a damp cloth to prevent drying when not in use.
6. Allow at least 24 hours for royal icing decorations to dry at room temperature.
Yield: 2 1/2 cups
